name: com.loopxxi/loop-mcp
description: L402-native MCP server for autonomous AI agents. Paid Bitcoin and Lightning tools are gated by per-call Lightning micropayments (10-25 sats) or fiat-funded credit keys. Provides live Bitcoin price, fee intelligence, send-or-wait decisions, Lightning Address resolution, transaction analysis, and optimal send-window timing.

payment.pricing_note: Per-tool pricing from 10 to 25 sats per call. L402 invoices are issued on first unauthenticated request; fiat credit keys can be purchased at https://api.loopxxi.com/ai-credits.

tools.name: btc_price
tools.description: Current Bitcoin price in USD and major fiat currencies. Source: mempool.space.

tools.name: btc_send_decision
tools.description: Composited send-or-wait decision for Bitcoin transactions. Returns SEND_NOW, WAIT, or URGENT_ONLY verdict with fee rates in sat/vB, mempool pressure, and estimated savings.

tools.name: lightning_address_resolve
tools.description: Resolve a Lightning Address (user@domain.com) to a payable BOLT11 invoice for a given amount. Handles the full LNURL-pay protocol in one MCP tool call.

tools.name: tx_decode_explain
tools.description: Fetch a Bitcoin transaction by txid and return a structured agent summary: type, fee, fee rate, confirmation status, RBF/SegWit/Taproot flags, and an agent_summary string.

tools.name: optimal_send_window
tools.description: Bitcoin transaction timing intelligence: recommended send window, fee trajectory, congestion forecast, confirmation targets, and RBF viability from live mempool data.

auth.description: No account required for L402. First tools/call returns HTTP 402 with a Lightning invoice and token; pay and retry with Authorization: L402 <token>:<preimage>. Fiat credit keys use Authorization: Bearer loop_<credit_key>.
